content: agent1: implementing case_sensitive param for groupby() filter in src/jinja2/filters.py. Will touch do_groupby (sync+async) and its helper. Let me know if you're touching filters.py too.

agent1: I'm adding case_sensitive: bool = False as a new kwarg to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (after default), using ignore_case postprocessor like do_sort, then remapping grouper to preserve original case of first item. We each submit independent patch.txt so no file merge needed, but wanted you to know the signature I'm introducing in case it affects your local edits.
